message:
refactor(fcp-ratelimit): explicit lock drops and idiomatic map_or

Minor cleanup to rate limiter implementations:

LeakyBucket::reset():
- Add explicit drop(level) before updating last_leak for clarity

SmoothPacer::state():
- Replace if-let-else with map_or for cleaner Option handling

FixedWindow (sliding_window.rs):
- Add explicit drop(state) in time_until_available and state()
- Ensures MutexGuard is released before duration calculations

No behavioral changes - purely stylistic improvements following
clippy and idiomatic Rust patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
